description: Pending approvals staged by the daily sync alert email (B32 / R25). Populated by Part B process_approvals.py; read/consumed when Ray replies APPROVE <token> or EDIT <token> from info@liveradiodfw.com. Part A leaves this as an empty scaffold so the schema is committed before Part B writes to it.

schema.title: show title from shows.json
schema.draft: exact draft text as it appeared in the alert email
schema.emailed_at: ISO timestamp when the alert was sent

pending.title: Third Rail in Harvest Hall
pending.draft: [DRAFT - machine-generated from calendar fields; review and enrich with venue-specific details before publish.] Live Radio DFW returns to Harvest Hall in Grapevine, TX for a Friday evening of live music. We'll be playing our mix of 70s, 80s, classic rock, and oldies covers across the set. A solid night out for the Grapevine, TX crowd and the surrounding DFW Metroplex communities.
pending.final_description: Live Radio DFW returns to the Third Rail stage inside Harvest Hall in downtown Grapevine for a Friday evening show. The Third Rail room is the dedicated live-music space at this 20,000-square-foot food hall - intimate, listening-room-friendly, and a setting where the band sounds the way it should. Make a night of it: eight chef-driven kitchens, two full bars, and the Grapevine TEXRail platform right outside the door if you're coming in from DFW Airport, Fort Worth, or anywhere along the line. Early September in Grapevine is the kind of evening this venue was built for. Grapevine, Colleyville, Southlake, and the rest of the mid-cities crowd, come join us.
